{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bear King Fist
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10951
|idx=144
|description=Formerly belonged to Koryeon Apostle Chaebol Chief. With these iron fists, he dominated underground arenas for decades. Now enhanced with Beast God modifications - can smash boulders in one punch!
|skill=
|hp=1100
|def=97
|atk=140
|rush=71
|gene1=Per Demon God slain, {race} ATK +5
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|gene2=Per Demon God slain, {race} HP +50
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|gene3=In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +5%
|gene7=In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
